channel.title: other on sainnhe's blog
channel.description: Recent content in other on sainnhe's blog

item.title: 通过创建 Wifi 热点来共享 V2ray 代理
item.description: 前言 V2ray 可以通过局域网共享代理，但是这要求在另一台设备上配置这个代理的 IP 地址和端口号，而有些设备不支持自定义这些代理配置，所以我想尝试一下直接

item.title: Contribution Guide for sainnhe/gruvbox-material-vscode
item.description: Requirements Make sure you have the following programs installed: git nodejs typescript vsce Start First of all, let’s try to package this extension and install it to your vscode. 1 2 3 4 5 $ git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sainnhe/gruvbox-material-vscode.git $ cd gruvbox-material-vscode $ npm install $ vsce package # see https://code.visualstudio.com/api/working-with-extensions/publishing-extension#vsce $ code --install-extension ./gruvbox-material-6.2.1.vsix Now, use vscode to open this project and modify some code, then press F5

item.title: Preview of iCursive Nerd Fonts
item.description: Fira Code iCursive S12 FiraCode(by tonsky, SIL Open Font License) + Script12 BT(by Bitstream, free for personal use) Fira Code iCursive Op (Non-free) FiraCode(by tonsky, SIL Open Font License) + Operator Mono(by Hoefler&Co, paid) Source Code Pro iCursive S12 Source Code Pro(by Paul D. Hunt (Adobe), SIL Open Font License) + Script12 BT(by Bitstream, free for personal use) Source Code Pro iCursive Op (Non-free) Source Code Pro(by Paul D. Hunt

item.title: 在 GitHub Pages 上搭建个人博客
item.description: 创建 Github Pages 新建一个 GitHub 仓库，仓库名为 <username>.github.io，其中 <username> 是你的用户名（不是昵称）。 比如我的用户名是 &ld
